note: Procyon sector hazards. Tier = threat level. Damage is narrative harm.

1.name: Wanted Level Escalation
1.description: The Hegemony's threat board ticks up a notch. More patrol routes cross your flight path. Docking fees triple without explanation.

1.name: Supply Shortage
1.description: The next station is dry. Spare parts, fuel cells, and rations are rationed by Guild order. Someone will have to do without.

1.name: Xeno Wildlife Encounter
1.description: The surface scan was wrong or incomplete. Something territorial and fast lives in this biome and it has already flanked the team.

1.name: Forged Papers Flagged
1.description: The docking authority's new scanner catches something off about the credentials. A clerk with a comm link and a suspicious expression.

2.name: Hegemony Patrol Intercept
2.description: A Hegemony patrol frigate drops out of hyperspace directly in your lane. Transponders check out or they don't. Boarding action pending.

2.name: Way Creature Sighting
2.description: Something from between the stars has taken an interest in the crew. It doesn't move like normal matter and it doesn't respond to normal stimuli.

2.name: Jumpgate Malfunction
2.description: The gate shudders on exit and spits the ship out off-course and off-schedule. Hull stress, navigation data scrambled, and an unknown system on the screens.

2.name: Bounty Hunter on Approach
2.description: A fast ship has been matching your heading for three jumps. No transponder. No comm response. It's closing.

3.name: Ion Storm
3.description: Sensors go dark. Comms go dark. The ion wall rolls over the ship and everything electronic becomes temporarily useless or permanently fried.

3.name: System Lockdown
3.description: The station governor has sealed all docking bays and issued a sector-wide arrest warrant. No one goes in or out without authorization no one has.

3.name: Pirate Ambush
3.description: Three ships drop out of the dust cloud. They've been waiting. The crew knew the route — which means someone talked.

3.name: Cult Ritual Interruption
3.description: The site is already occupied. Something is mid-ritual, the air smells of burnt ozone and old blood, and stopping it is the only option.

4.name: Void Exposure
4.description: The hull breach is small but the vacuum is absolute. Every second counts, suit or no suit, and the cold of space cares nothing for quick thinking.

4.name: Ancient Ur Defense System
4.description: The Ur ruin has automated defenses that predate every known civilization. They activate without warning and they were not built for biological targets.

4.name: Antimatter Containment Breach
4.description: The drive's containment field is failing. Every crew member has minutes to either fix it, vent it safely, or get very far away.

4.name: Lost Legion Boarding Action
4.description: They come through the airlock in vacuum suits with no insignia and no comm traffic. The Lost Legion takes ships, not prisoners, and they've already cut the emergency beacon.
